name: Crumb Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble shortening into sugar and flour.
2. Reserve 3/4 cup of the mixture for topping.
3. To the remaining dry ingredients, add shortening, milk, and egg.
4. Mix well and place in a deep, 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Cover with the reserved 3/4 cup crumbs.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes or until done.
